Chat Edit: 'Ah! The Qt IDE! Let me find and launch it:


Get-ChildItem "C:\Users\HiH8e\OneDrive\Desktop\Powershield\RawrXD-ModelLoader" -Recurse -Filter "*Qt*.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Name, @{Name="Size(MB)";Expression={[math]::Round($_.Length/1MB,2)}}
Found it! RawrXD-QtShell.exe in the build-msvc directory! Let me launch it:
